desc:
f15v 特征描述

茎与花：单茎细长，呈“S”形弯曲。未见明显花朵。
叶片：极具辨识度的大型簇生叶。叶片宽阔且边缘带有尖锐的钩刺，表面布满红、绿、白相间的横向条纹。
根部：红褐色。典型的须根系，由数条粗壮的根条向下方和两侧延伸。

Stem & Flowers: Single slender stem with an "S-shaped" curve. No distinct flowers visible.
Leaves: Highly recognizable large clustered foliage. Broad leaves with sharp hooked thorns along the edges, featuring horizontal stripes in red, green, and white.
Roots: Reddish-brown. Typical fibrous root system with several thick rootlets extending downwards and outwards.
